creator: isupov@moonhe.jinr.ru
text:
>Submitter proposed to mark it BROKEN only if X support is
>chosen. Since default is with X, I guess we should turn it off too.

   Submitter proposed to mark it BROKEN only if X support is NOT chosen,
which corresponds to -r option. WITH X support it works !

        .ifdef WITHOUT_X11
      ! BROKEN = "doscmd -r doesn't work"
      ! #MAKE_ARGS+= -DNO_X
      ! #PLIST_SUB+= X11="@comment "
        .else
